subcodes.first_line: O thou who speakest forth with counsels, admonitions and advice, when these proceed from the lips of God's loved ones, they become the very life of hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بنصائح وعظ و پند چون از دهان یاران الهی صدور یابد حیات قلوب شود و
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
